dict.source: Options which change how Prism styles Obsidian.
dict.target: 改变 Prism 样式如何应用于 Obsidian 的选项。
强调色、配色方案和风格

dict.source: The `Custom` option allows you to use a CSS snippet with your own colors. Refer to the Prism Wiki guide `Custom Color Schemes` for more info.
dict.target: `Custom` 选项允许您使用包含自定义颜色的 CSS 代码片段。有关更多信息，请参阅 Prism Wiki 中的 `Custom Color Schemes` 指南。

dict.source: Adjusts the style used by the main elements in the UI.
dict.target: 调整 UI 中主要元素的样式。

dict.source: Adjusts the style used by the Accented elements in the UI.
dict.target: 调整 UI 中强调元素的样式。

dict.source: Changes the Light Theme Accent Color around the entire UI. Select from present colors or choose 'Custom' and tune the color in the Custom Accent Color Tuning section below.
dict.target: 更改整个 UI 的浅色主题强调色。从现有颜色中选择，或选择“自定义”并在下方的自定义强调色调整部分进行调色。

dict.source: Adjusts the color used by the text in the Light Theme Accented elements of the UI.
dict.target: 调整 UI 中浅色主题强调元素所使用的文字颜色。

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Light Theme Accent Text Color for this to work.
dict.target: 请确保在“浅色主题强调文字颜色”中选择了“自定义”，此设置才能生效。

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Accent Color Preset for this to work.
dict.target: 请确保在“强调色预设”中选择了“自定义”，此设置才能生效。

dict.source: Accent Base Color should ideally be the lightest of the 3.
dict.target: 强调色基色应为三者中最浅的。

dict.source: Accent Tint Color should ideally be between Base and Text in terms of lightness.
dict.target: 强调色色调在亮度上应介于基色和文字色之间。

dict.source: Accent Text Color should ideally be the darkest of the 3.
dict.target: 强调文字色应为三者中最深的。

dict.source: Changes the Dark Theme Accent Color around the entire UI. Select from present colors or choose 'Custom' and tune the color in the Custom Accent Color Tuning section below.
dict.target: 更改整个 UI 的暗色主题强调色。从现有颜色中选择，或选择“自定义”并在下方的自定义强调色调整部分中调整颜色。

dict.source: Adjusts the color used by the text in the Dark Theme Accented elements of the UI.
dict.target: 调整 UI 中暗色主题强调元素内文本的颜色。

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Accent Text Color for this to work.
dict.target: 请确保在暗色主题强调文本颜色中选择了“自定义”，此设置才能生效。

dict.source: Accent Base Color should ideally be the darkest of the 3.
dict.target: 强调基色理想情况下应为三者中最深的颜色。

dict.source: Accent Text Color should ideally be the lightest of the 3.
dict.target: 强调文字颜色应为三者中最浅的。

dict.source: Define the colors used in the Graph View. In order to see changes you need to refresh the Graph View (restart Obsidian or toggle the Light/Dark theme).
dict.target: 定义图谱视图中所使用的颜色。要查看更改，您需要刷新图谱视图（重启 Obsidian 或切换浅色/深色主题）。

dict.source: The color of a Graph lines connecting Graph Nodes.
dict.target: 连接图谱节点的图谱连线的颜色。

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Light Theme Graph Lines Color Presets for this to work.
dict.target: 确保您在浅色主题图谱连线颜色预设中选择了“自定义”，这样设置才能生效。

dict.source: The color of a Graph Node representing a note file.
dict.target: 表示笔记文件的图谱节点颜色。

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Light Theme Graph Note Color Presets for this to work.
dict.target: 请确保在“浅色主题图谱笔记颜色预设”中选择了“自定义”，此设置才能生效。

dict.source: The color of a Graph Node representing currently focused note file.
dict.target: 表示当前聚焦笔记文件的图谱节点颜色。
图谱笔记聚焦颜色预设
图谱笔记聚焦自定义颜色

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Light Theme Graph Note Focused Color Presets for this to work.
dict.target: 确保在“浅色主题”的“Graph Note Focused Color Presets”中选择了“Custom”，此设置才生效。

dict.source: The color of a Graph Node representing a tag.
dict.target: 代表标签的图节点颜色。

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Light Theme Graph Tag Color Presets for this to work.
dict.target: 确保在“浅色主题”的“Graph Tag Color Presets”中选择了“Custom”，此设置才生效。

dict.source: The color of a Graph Node representing an attachment.
dict.target: 代表附件的图节点颜色。

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Light Theme Graph Attachment Color Presets for this to work.
dict.target: 请确保在“浅色主题图形附件颜色预设”中选择了“自定义”，此设置才能生效。

dict.source: The color of a Graph Node representing an unresolved note.
dict.target: 表示未解决笔记的图形节点的颜色。
图形未解决自定义颜色

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Light Theme Graph Unresolved Color Presets for this to work.
dict.target: 请确保在“浅色主题图形未解决颜色预设”中选择了“自定义”，此设置才能生效。

dict.source: The color of a Graph Node when highlighted.
Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Light Theme Graph Highlight Color Presets for this to work.
dict.target: 请确保在“浅色主题Graph高亮颜色预设”中选择了“自定义”，此设置才会生效。

dict.source: The color of the lines connected to a highlighted Graph Node.
dict.target: 连接到高亮Graph节点的连线的颜色。

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Graph Lines Color Presets for this to work.
dict.target: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Graph Lines Color Presets for this to work.

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Graph Note Color Presets for this to work.
dict.target: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Graph Note Color Presets for this to work.

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Graph Note Focused Color Presets for this to work.
dict.target: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Graph Note Focused Color Presets for this to work.

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Graph Tag Color Presets for this to work.
dict.target: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Graph Tag Color Presets for this to work.

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Graph Attachment Color Presets for this to work.
dict.target: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Graph Attachment Color Presets for this to work.

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Graph Unresolved Color Presets for this to work.
dict.target: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Graph Unresolved Color Presets for this to work.

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Graph Highlight Color Presets for this to work.
dict.target: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Graph Highlight Color Presets for this to work.

dict.source: Custom Vault Banner in the File Explorer with a custom icon option.
dict.target: Custom Vault Banner in the File Explorer with a custom icon option.

dict.source: Enables the Custom Vault Banner in the File Explorer.
dict.target: 在文件资源管理器中启用自定义库横幅。

dict.source: Customise the Vault Banner Icon. Insert a URL to an image in between the brackets of 'url()'.
dict.target: 自定义库横幅图标。在 'url()' 的括号之间插入图片的 URL。

dict.source: Focused Mode fades away UI distractions so you can better focus on your notes. Look in the Prism Wiki for a guide.
dict.target: 聚焦模式会淡化 UI 干扰，以便您更好地专注于笔记。请查看 Prism Wiki 寻找指南。

dict.source: This toggle can be bound to a hotkey! Look for `Style Settings Toggle Enable Focused Mode` in `Settings -> Hotkeys Tab` to bind it.
dict.target: 此开关可以绑定到快捷键！在 `设置 -> 快捷键` 选项卡中查找 `Style Settings Toggle Enable Focused Mode` 以进行绑定。

dict.source: Select the type of Focused Mode you want to use.
dict.target: 选择您要使用的聚焦模式类型。

dict.source: Set the opacity value you'd like the UI to fade to.
dict.target: 设置 UI 淡出后的透明度值。

dict.source: Set the delay value (ms) you'd like the UI to stay active after being hovered over.
dict.target: 设置鼠标悬停后 UI 保持可见的延迟时间（毫秒）。

dict.source: Settings for elements inside the Editor / Preview area of Obsidian.
dict.target: Obsidian 编辑器/预览区域内的元素设置。

dict.source: Changes the maximum width of the Readable Line Length (px). Enable 'Readable line length' in the Editor tab in Settings for this to apply.
dict.target: 修改可读行长最大宽度（像素）。请在设置 > 编辑器中启用“可读行长”以应用此设置。

dict.source: Options for the default Sans Serif 3 font.
dict.target: 默认无衬线字体3的选项。

dict.source: Customisation options for the Headers (H1 - H6).
dict.target: 标题（H1 - H6）的自定义选项。

dict.source: The sizes are scalled based on the Font Size selected in the Appearance tab of the Settings.
dict.target: 基于设置外观选项卡中选择的字体大小进行缩放。

dict.source: Options for changing the color of each header type.
dict.target: 更改每种标题类型的颜色的选项。
内联标题文字颜色预设
内联标题自定义文字颜色

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Light Theme Inline Title Text Color Preset for this to work.
dict.target: 请确保在“浅色主题内联标题文字颜色预设”中选择了“自定义”，否则此设置无效。

dict.target: 确保在深色主题行内标题文字颜色预设中选择了“自定义”，否则此设置无效。

dict.source: Adjust the color of different types of text in the Editor.
dict.target: 调整编辑器中不同类型文字的颜色。
用于：*斜体文字* 或 _斜体文字_。

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Light Theme Italic Text Color Preset for this to work.
dict.target: 确保在“浅色主题斜体文字颜色预设”中选择了“自定义”，此功能才能生效。
用于：**粗体文字** 或 __粗体文字__。

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Light Theme Bold Text Color Preset for this to work.
dict.target: 确保在“浅色主题粗体文字颜色预设”中选择了“自定义”，此功能才能生效。

dict.source: Italic and Bold Text Color Preset
dict.target: 斜体和粗体文字颜色预设

dict.source: Used for: ***Italic and Bold Text*** or ___Italic and Bold Text___.
dict.target: 用于：***斜体和粗体文字*** 或 ___斜体和粗体文字___。
用于：~~删除线文字~~ 或 ~~删除线文字~~。
删除线文字自定义颜色

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Light Theme Underline Line Color Preset for this to work.

用于：[[内部链接]] 或 [内部链接](Internal%20Link.md)。

dict.target: 确保在“浅色主题内部链接颜色预设”中选择了“自定义”，否则此设置无效。

dict.source: Used for: [Obsidian Website](https://obsidian.md) or [Note in another vault](obsidian://open?vault=MainVault&file=Note.md).
dict.target: 用于：[Obsidian 网站](https://obsidian.md) 或 [其他仓库中的笔记](obsidian://open?vault=MainVault&file=Note.md)。

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Underline Line Color Preset for this to work.
dict.target: 请确保在“深色主题下划线线条颜色预设”中选择了“自定义”，否则设置无效。

dict.target: 请确保在“深色主题外部链接颜色预设”中选择了“自定义”，否则设置无效。

dict.source: Adjusts the style used by the <mark> tag highlight system. Colors available = red, orange, yellow, green, mint, cyan, blue, purple, pink and grey. e.g. <mark class="red">Your Red text</mark>
dict.target: 调整 <mark> 标签高亮系统的样式。可用颜色 = 红、橙、黄、绿、薄荷、青、蓝、紫、粉和灰。例如 <mark class="red">您的红色文本</mark>
标记高亮文本颜色预设

dict.source: Settings for spacing, position, alignment and other adjustments of different UI elements.
dict.target: 设置不同 UI 元素的间距、位置、对齐和其他调整。

dict.source: Settings for positioning, alignment, etc. of different UI elements within the Sidebars and the Main Workspace.
dict.target: 设置侧边栏和主工作区内不同 UI 元素的位置、对齐等。

dict.source: The size of the border radius around larger elements of the UI.
dict.target: UI中较大元素的边框圆角大小。

dict.source: The size of the border radius around smaller elements of the UI.
dict.target: UI中较小元素的边框圆角大小。

Horizontal Alignment of the Tab Headers in the Main Workspace.
dict.target: 主工作区标签页头部的水平对齐方式。

dict.source: Customisation options for the File Explorer module.
dict.target: 文件浏览器模块自定义选项。

dict.source: Replaces the Arrow dropdown icon with a Folder icon (different icons for closed and open folders).
dict.target: 将箭头下拉图标替换为文件夹图标（关闭和打开的文件夹使用不同的图标）。

dict.source: Different presets for the Folder Dropdown Icon Color. Make sure to enable the option above `Enable Folder Dropdown Icon` for this to apply.
dict.target: 文件夹下拉图标颜色的不同预设。请确保启用上方的“启用文件夹下拉图标”选项以使此设置生效。
打开文件夹的高亮颜色
为文件资源管理器中的文件夹上色。

dict.source: This option will overwrite the behaviour of Folder Dropdown Icon Color.
dict.target: 此选项将覆盖文件夹下拉图标颜色的行为。

dict.source: Select the desired style for the Colored Folders.
dict.target: 选择彩色文件夹的样式。

dict.source: Settings for changing the style of the Titlebar.
dict.target: 更改标题栏样式的设置。

dict.source: Hides the Titlebar Title Text (Only applies when Window frame style is set to Obsidian frame).
dict.target: 隐藏标题栏标题文字（仅当窗口框架样式设置为 Obsidian 框架时生效）。

dict.source: Settings for the Status Bar. Adjust position, Change the order of items, etc.
dict.target: 状态栏设置。调整位置、更改项目顺序等。

dict.source: Change the Position of the Status Bar.
Change the Horizontal Alignment of the Fixed Status Bar.
dict.target: 更改固定状态栏的水平对齐方式

dict.source: Choose between Default and Custom colors for the Light Theme Status Bar.
dict.target: 为浅色主题状态栏选择默认或自定义颜色

dict.target: 确保在浅色主题状态栏预设中选择了“自定义”，否则设置无效。

dict.source: Choose the color used for the Light Theme Status Bar Text/Icons.
dict.target: 选择浅色主题状态栏文字/图标的颜色。

dict.source: Choose between Default and Custom colors for the Dark Theme Status Bar.
dict.target: 为深色主题状态栏选择默认或自定义颜色。

dict.source: Make sure you selected 'Custom' in Dark Theme Status Bar Preset for this to work.
dict.target: 确保在深色主题状态栏预设中选择了“自定义”，否则设置无效。

dict.source: Choose the color used for the Dark Theme Status Bar Text/Icons.
dict.target: 选择深色主题状态栏文字/图标的颜色。

dict.source: Settings for the Scrollbar. Adjust the width, Add Scroll Buttons, etc.
dict.target: 滚动条设置。调整宽度、添加滚动按钮等。

dict.source: Change the width of the Scrollbar (px).

dict.target: Mgmeyers 的 Obsidian 看板插件 (https://github.com/mgmeyers/obsidian-kanban)。
禁用看板标题卡片计数

dict.source: Removes the Card Count in the Kanban Lane Title.
dict.target: 移除看板列标题中的卡片计数。

dict.source: Aligns the Kanban Lane Title to the center.
dict.target: 将看板列标题居中对齐。

dict.source: Change the Light Theme background of the Kanban board.
dict.target: 更改看板的浅色主题背景。

dict.source: Change the Dark Theme background of the Kanban board.
dict.target: 更改看板的深色主题背景。

dict.source: Use UI Accent Color for Icon Folder
dict.target: 图标文件夹使用 UI 强调色

dict.source: Makes the Folder Icons inherit the UI Accent Color.
dict.target: 使文件夹图标继承 UI 强调色。

dict.source: Use UI Accent Color for Icons
dict.target: 使用 UI 强调色作为图标颜色

dict.source: Makes the Icons inherit the UI Accent Color.
dict.target: 使图标继承 UI 强调色。

dict.source: Toggle / hide certain aspects of the theme.
dict.target: 切换/隐藏主题的某些方面。

dict.source: Fades out inactive UI tabs to help distinguish the currently active tab.
dict.target: 淡出非活动标签页，以帮助区分当前活动标签页。

dict.source: Disables the blur background in all elements that use it by making them opaque.
dict.target: 通过使元素不透明来禁用所有使用模糊背景的元素的模糊效果。

dict.source: This option removes the title from pinned tabs and adds back the default file icon for the markdown files. Helps reduce the horizontal space wasted by pinned tabs. You can still see the title when you hover over the icon. NOTE - This option requires Installer Version 1.1.9+ due to use of CSS `has()`. Also, might not work on certain Mobile clients.
dict.target: 此选项移除固定标签页上的标题，并恢复 Markdown 文件的默认文件图标。有助于减少固定标签页浪费的水平空间。将鼠标悬停在图标上时，您仍可看到标题。注意 - 此选项需要安装程序版本 1.1.9+，因为使用了 CSS `has()`。此外，可能无法在某些移动客户端上工作。
启用 PDF 暗色主题

dict.source: This option adds styling to the PDF pages by blending in with the colour scheme in Dark mode; making it more eye friendly. This isn't a perfect solution. Note that some images might look inverted and colours be a different shade compared to the original file.
dict.target: 此选项通过融入暗色模式的配色方案，为 PDF 页面添加样式，使其对眼睛更友好。这不是完美的解决方案。请注意，某些图像可能看起来是反色的，且颜色与原始文件相比可能略有不同。
禁用 Prism 提示框样式

dict.source: This option removes the custom Callout Styling introduced with Prism and reverts to a completely default look. This should be used if you prefer the default callout styling or have CSS Snippets that use it's customisation options.
dict.target: 此选项移除 Prism 引入的自定义提示框样式，并恢复完全默认的外观。如果您更喜欢默认的提示框样式或拥有使用其自定义选项的 CSS 代码片段，则应使用此选项。
禁用 Prism 标记高亮样式

dict.source: This option removes the Prism Mark Highlight Styling (reverts to default look). This will be handy for those that already use a different <mark> tag based highlighting system.
dict.target: 此选项移除 Prism 标记高亮样式（恢复默认外观）。对于已经使用基于 <mark> 标签的不同高亮系统的人来说，这会很方便。

dict.source: Options for enabling and customising the Alternative Checkboxes feature.
dict.target: 用于启用和自定义替代复选框功能的选项。
启用 Prism 替代复选框

dict.source: Disable this if you are using your own implementation via a CSS Snippet.
dict.target: 如果您使用 CSS 代码片段实现了自己的复选框，请禁用此项。

dict.source: Additional help and information regarding Prism.
dict.target: 关于 Prism 的更多帮助和信息。

dict.source:
🏛️Prism Wiki
📦Prism Releases & Changelog
dict.target:
🏛️Prism 维基
📦Prism 发布版与更新日志

dict.source: If you are enjoying the theme, here are some ways to support its development.
dict.target: 如果您喜欢这个主题，这里有一些支持其开发的方式。

dict.source:
🌠Star the project on GitHub
⚠️Submit an Issue
☕ Buy me a coffee!
dict.target:
🌠在 GitHub 上给项目加星
⚠️提交 Issue
☕请我喝杯咖啡！
